activePatient.doctorPreference: Dr. Chen wants articulating paper passed before distal wall refinement and prefers the mirror held lingual during the clearance check.

templates.name: Crown Prep Consult Intake
templates.summary: Referral verification, restorative history, limited imaging, and doctor handoff for a crown-prep consult.

tasks.label: Referral packet and patient identity
tasks.detail: Front desk has matched name, DOB, and the referral note to the existing chart shell.

tasks.label: Medical history and consent review
tasks.detail: Allergies, nitrous clearance, medications, and signed treatment consents are being reconciled before rooming.

tasks.label: PA, bitewing, and shade photos
tasks.detail: Assistant lane is queued to capture the PA, bitewing, and pre-op shade photos before doctor exam.

tasks.label: Insurance card images
tasks.detail: Back-side insurance card image is still missing, so the estimate packet cannot be finalized.

tasks.label: Doctor exam brief and room release
tasks.detail: Doctor handoff stays blocked until medical history is cleared and pre-op imaging is attached.

templates.name: Emergency Limited Exam
templates.summary: Rapid pain triage, medication review, limited imaging, and same-visit doctor routing.

tasks.label: Pain scale, swelling, and triage notes
tasks.detail: Front desk is documenting pain score, swelling, and last analgesic dose at check-in.

tasks.label: Medication and allergy screen
tasks.detail: Assistant must clear allergy and medication conflicts before the doctor enters for the limited exam.

tasks.label: Limited PA capture
tasks.detail: Single PA is queued for the symptomatic tooth before the room is released to the doctor.

tasks.label: Doctor limited exam
tasks.detail: Doctor entry remains blocked until the pain note and PA image are both posted to chart.

templates.name: Comprehensive New Patient Exam
templates.summary: Registration, consents, baseline records, and full doctor intake for first-visit patients.

tasks.label: Registration and consent packet
tasks.detail: Front desk is collecting demographics, HIPAA, consent, and referral source before records start.

tasks.label: Baseline photo set and chart seeding
tasks.detail: Assistant records are queued to add baseline photos and start the doctor note shell.

tasks.label: Doctor comprehensive exam handoff
tasks.detail: Doctor intake stays blocked until registration is complete and baseline records are posted.
